title: IIM Udaipur Junior Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Junior Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Management Udaipur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Junior Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Candidates with prior experience in administration and digital content management will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per qualifications, experience, and institutional norms.
salary_details.details: As per qualifications, experience, and institutional norms.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
